name: Pie Crust
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 tablespoons skim milk, or as needed
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the flour, sugar, and salt in a 9-inch pie plate and stir with a fork until blended.
2. Drizzle the oil and milk over the mixture, then lightly toss with the fork or fingertips until crumbly.
3. Pinch the mixture together; if it is too dry and crumbly, add a few more drops of milk.
4. With the back of a spoon or fingers, press or pat the dough evenly over the bottom and up the sides and rim of the pie plate, taking care not to build it up in the corners.
5. To crimp the edge, either press the floured tines of a fork onto the dough on the rim, or pinch the dough into a fluted pattern with your fingers.
6. Refrigerate the crust for at least 30 minutes.
